response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and systems software developer with strong web, testing, and open-source credentials, but his background does not match this role's core requirements. He has no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, computer architecture, AI accelerator or GPU workload analysis, or hardware-software co-design; his performance work (low-latency DLang services) is at the distributed-systems level, not the silicon/microarchitecture level this principal-level position demands.
strengths: Deep low-latency systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) handling millions of requests per second
Broad polyglot engineering background including C/C++ work on engineering tooling at National Instruments
Strong craftsmanship record: TDD, open-source authorship, and community teaching/workshops
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon architecture, or hardware performance-modeling experience
No deep-learning training/inference optimization, GPU, or SIMD/MIMD architecture background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, far from principal-level accelerator architecture scope
